step_by_step_thinking:
To determine the position and integrity of an ICD in a patient experiencing shock, we need methods that can visualize metallic components accurately. Among the listed options, **plain radiographs** (\boxed{D}) stand out because they effectively show the location and configuration of metal parts used in ICDs through its characteristic spiral thickening pattern around the shocking coils.

To determine the position and integrity of an ICD in a patient experiencing shock, we need methods that can visualize metallic components accurately. Among the listed options, **plain radiographs** (\boxed{D}) stand out because they effectively show the location and configuration of metal parts used in ICDs through its characteristic spiral thickening pattern around the shocking coils.
